creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text: FreeBSD 9.3 is no longer supported. We're removing (and not adding) specific support for it from the ports tree, sorry. You are free to stay with ports tree snapshot at the time of EoL to keep your system working, if you don't want to update. Note that because 9.x is no longer supported, you will no longer get security fixes to the base system.
